text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm. I've completed all my goals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The summer camp leading up to the Kikuka Sho
appears to have been a highly satisfying training
experience for Air Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All that's left is to find a good place to feed
Parcae the data on what we've achieved.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It looks like the Kikuka Sho might be a bigger
deal than I anticipated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur can now speak about her future
without trouble. It's a very touching sight, on the
one hand...
choice_data_list:
(But ultimately, I wasn't able to fill Parcae's
place.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wiped myself out just prepping for camp, then
worked myself ragged the whole trip... I've barely
even slept.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Why? Yawn all you want for all I care.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You're sittin' with someone else on the bus back.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...? I feel like Tachyon was sitting next to me
before...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You sayin' you wanna sit next to her?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: No, not pa—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Then, who cares?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You. You're next to Cafe now. She keeps quiet,
so you can sleep if you want.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Wow... You would sit next to Tachyon yourself for
that?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I didn't realize you... You care about your Trainer
a lot.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You have no idea what you're talkin' about. It's
just about efficiency.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I need my trainer to take every opportunity to
sleep. I won't have any screwups in my training
due to exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But... are you really okay leaving your trainer with us?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I thought you weren't comfortable with my friend's
presence.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Not my problem. I'm sittin' somewhere else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to some maneuvering on Air Shakur's part,
I sleep well on the journey back to the academy.
